steps.title: Identify the cause and result
steps.content: The first sentence says contour modeling and box modeling usually require software to process thousands of geometric shapes. The next sentence compares them with surface model methods, which require processors to manage millions of polygons. Because they demand less processing power, the first two methods are more economical.

steps.title: Eliminate weak transitions
steps.content: Choice A, “Instead,” would suggest replacement rather than result. Choice B, “Specifically,” would introduce a detail of the same idea, not a consequence. Choice D, “For example,” would introduce an example, but the sentence draws a conclusion from the processing demands. The result transition fits. The answer is C.
